title: Basic Terms
description: Basic Terms documents basic terms material for LabVIEW in the language domain. It is classified as a concept page, so readers can understand its topic, scope, and place in the wiki taxonomy. The page highlights 프런트패널, 블록다이어그램, 팔레트, 터미널, and 컨트롤, with examples, commands, diagrams, or references kept close to the relevant explanation. Important search terms include terms, basic terms, basic-terms, and language, helping both humans and generated indexes connect this page with adjacent concepts. The route is language / labview / basic-terms / index, and the frontmatter keeps the canonical subject, ontology role, and navigation context aligned with repository validation. Use it for quick orientation, implementation reminders, and deeper research.
